ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert capture after specified text. Accepts format syntax. Tip: use a heading (starts with #) to target a section. Blank line handling is configurable below.
ast.target: 在指定文本后插入捕获内容。接受格式语法。提示：使用标题（以 # 开头）来定位章节。空行处理可在下方配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert captured content on the same line, immediately after the matched text (no newline added).
ast.target: 在同一行匹配文本后立即插入捕获内容（不添加换行）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace everything after the matched text up to end-of-line.
ast.target: 替换匹配文本之后直到行尾的所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the text at the end of the matched section instead of the top.
ast.target: 将文本放置在匹配部分的末尾而非顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also include the section’s subsections (requires target to be a heading starting with #). Subsections are headings inside the section.
ast.target: 同时包含该章节的子章节（要求目标为以 # 开头的标题）。子章节是章节内部的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 在指定文件夹中创建文件。如果指定了多个文件夹，系统将提示您选择在哪个文件夹中创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 创建笔记时，系统将提示您从所选文件夹及其子文件夹中进行选择。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 在当前活动文件所在的文件夹中创建文件。如果没有活动文件，则不会创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: Set default behavior rather then prompting user on what to do if a file already exists.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model the AI Assistant will use
ast.target: AI 助手将使用的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.
ast.target: 用于存储AI助手输出的变量名称，例如{{value:output}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新标记在文本中已有的出现频率对其进行惩罚，从而降低模型逐字重复相同内容的可能性。默认值为0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新标记是否已在文本中出现过对其进行惩罚，从而增加模型讨论新话题的可能性。默认值为0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the file. Supports formatting like {{DATE}}, {{VALUE}}, etc.
ast.target: 文件路径。支持{{DATE}}、{{VALUE}}等格式化变量。

ast.source: Use multi-line input prompt instead of single-line input prompt
ast.target: 使用多行输入提示而非单行输入提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep drafts when closing input prompts so they can be restored on reopen. Drafts are stored only for this session.
ast.target: 关闭输入提示时保留草稿，以便重新打开时可以恢复。草稿仅在此会话中存储。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 启用后，Capture 将使用当前编辑器选择作为 {{VALUE}} 并可能跳过提示。禁用后，Capture 将始终提示输入 {{VALUE}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcodes for natural language date parsing. One per line: alias = phrase. Example: tm = tomorrow.
ast.target: 用于自然语言日期解析的快捷代码。每行一个：别名 = 短语。例如：tm = tomorrow。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, including contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.
ast.target: 这可以防止插件向外部提供商（如 OpenAI）发出请求。您仍然可以使用用户脚本来执行任意代码，包括联系外部提供商。但是，此设置会禁用插件功能（如 AI 助手）执行此类操作。您需要禁用此设置才能使用 AI 助手。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 将 QuickAdd 图标添加到侧边栏功能区。需要重新加载。

regex.target: setDesc("设置默认行为，而不是在文件已存在时提示用户该怎么做。")

regex.target: setDesc("AI 助手将使用的模型")

regex.target: setDesc("用于存储 AI 助手输出的变量名称，例如 {{value:output}}。")

regex.source: setDesc("Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.")
regex.target: setDesc("正值会根据新 token 在已有文本中的出现频率进行惩罚，从而降低模型逐字重复同一行的可能性。默认值为 0。")

regex.source: setDesc("Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.")
regex.target: setDesc("正值会根据新 token 是否已出现在文本中进行惩罚，增加模型谈论新主题的可能性。默认值为 0。")

regex.source: setDesc("Path to the file. Supports formatting like {{DATE}}, {{VALUE}}, etc.")

regex.target: setDesc("用于自然语言日期解析的快捷码。每行一个：别名 = 短语。示例：tm = tomorrow。")

tm = tomorrow
yd = yesterday`)

tm = tomorrow
yd = yesterday`)
